html:
Manure is an important resource for Farming. It is generated renewably by several creatures in the world, most notably Beefalo which make lots of it in herds for easy collection, but also including Koalefants, Pigs, and Splumonkeys. It can stack up to a maximum of 20 in the Inventory or on the ground and does not spoil over time.

Manure can be used to Fertilize the vegetables produced in a Farm and helps them grow faster, unless it is Winter. Manure can also be used to fertilize Grass Tufts or Berry Bushes after they have been dug up with a Shovel and replanted, although 1 Rot is just as effective for this. Guano works similarly; Guano is a better fertilizer than Manure, but cannot be used to craft any of the Farms.

In a pinch, Manure can also be used as fuel in Campfire or Fire Pits. It will burn for 90 seconds and releases a gas cloud when burned, which is only a visual effect. For practical purposes however, Logs are much easier to collect.

Contents

  • 1 Gathering
    • 1.1 Gathering methods
  • 2 Downloadable Content
  • 3 Usage
  • 4 Gallery

Gathering

Plop Patron Method of Contribution
Periodically
Eating Fruits or Vegetables
Thrown
(x1) (x2) Using a
(x5) When the slots roll three carrots
Hand picked

Gathering methods

Manure can most easily be gathered near Beefalo herds, typically found in Savanna biomes. Each Beefalo (adult or baby) randomly drops Manure as they roam around the map. This can be helped by trapping the herd in a pen, but Beefalo can escape pens when in Heat.

Manure can also be generated by Pigs. When a Pig consumes a flower petal, vegetable or fruit food item (not meat which instead tames them), they will drop Manure. Pigs accept only one non-meat food per fifteen seconds. After this time has elapsed, the player can feed the Pig again. However, when a Pig becomes a Werepig, it will eat entire stacks of food one item after another and produce entire stacks of Manure at once. While more tricky, this makes them much more efficient.

Koalefants also drop Manure similar to Beefalo; however, as only one Koalefant spawns at a time, it is less efficient to gather from them. This can be done easier by trapping the Koalefant in a pen.

Splumonkeys do not drop Manure but will throw it at attackers, which inflicts damage and lowers sanity. They can be picked up after. When destroyed, Pig Torches and Splumonkey Pods drop Manure.

Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Prime Apes will throw Manure at the player when attacked. Attacking one will cause all nearby Prime Apes to become hostile. Prime Apes also drop Manure when killed. Both of these sources depend on the Prime Ape having at least one piece of Manure in the first place, which is generated when it eats. Being hit by Manure decreases the player's sanity, but does not do any damage to their health. Hammering Prime Ape Huts also yields Manure.

Similar to Beefalo, Water Beefalo are a reliable source of manure. They can be found in Mangrove biomes.

Wilbur can equip Manure like a weapon and throw it at enemies. Once thrown, the Manure is destroyed and cannot be picked up again. Additionally, Wilbur will naturally drop Manure every few days.

In the Hamlet DLC, Manure will be dropped periodically by Pig Traders in the Pig Cities. The player will be paid an Oinc per picked Manure by nearby Pigs. Manure is also produced by Spider Monkeys, much like Beefalo.

Gallery

  • A Beefalo and Manure pin set.
  • Dump
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

"poop"
“I should fill my pockets!”
–Wilson
“Ew. Nasty. But useful.”
–Willow
“Smelly!”
–Wolfgang
“Life is blood and this.”
–Wendy
“THESE ANIMALS ARE DISGUSTING”
–WX-78
“A quantity of animal feces. How fragrant.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't poop in camp!”
–Woodie
“It's the way of all mortal life.”
–Maxwell
“A remarkably massive mound of manure!”
–Wagstaff
“If önly I cöuld use it as camöuflage fröm predatörs.”
–Wigfrid
“Doodoo.”
–Webber
“Surf sewage!”
–Walani
“The end result of a fine meal.”
–Warly
“What scallywag left their poop layin' about!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS PLOP”
–Wilba
“Mmm... Smells good!”
–Wormwood
“Never thought I'd say this, but I could really use that poop.”
–Wheeler
“Nothing to be ashamed of.”
–Winona
“Physical digestion is very unpleasant.”
–Wortox
“Ha ha, stinky!”
–Wurt
“It's a natural part of nature!”
–Walter
“That's one healthy bowel movement.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Phân bón là nguồn tài nguyên quan trọng cho việc trồng trọt. Nó được tạo ra có thể tái tạo bởi một số sinh vật trên thế giới, đáng chú ý nhất là Bò Lai tạo ra rất nhiều thành đàn để dễ dàng thu thập, nhưng cũng bao gồm cả Gấu túi, Lợn và Khỉ mỏ. Nó có thể xếp tối đa 20 cái trong Kho hoặc trên mặt đất và không bị hư hỏng theo thời gian.

Manure can also be generated by Pigs. When a [[Pig]] consumes a flower petal, vegetable or fruit food item (not meat which instead tames them), they will drop Manure.
